title: MCS2Knife-addon
description: The mod version of MCS2 Knifepack, enabling auto-installation and loading of the weapon pack.
body:
![mcs2knife-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01bb4978a551f5d071976ca64ba253738a03d951_0.webp)

Notice:
This mod is the automatic installation version of Timeless and Classics:Zero add-on:
the MCS2 Knifepack mod.

If the Timeless and Classics:Zero or LR Tactical mod is not installed, the mod will not display any content in the game.

This version is the official free release. An early access version has already been published on Afdian, and a Patreon page is currently in preparation.
The official release will gradually include the content from the early access version through future updates.
afdian:[放弃思考の乔孙正在创作Minecraft mod TaCZ's additional gunpack——MCS2 | 爱发电](https://afdian.com/a/tmhgutsun)
patreon:WIP
This knifepack is still in progress,currently there is 1 knife in this pack which is
Bayonet (and its skin)
[Important!] How to install: 

For TaCZ:

put the .jar file under .minecraft\mods then launch your client
